ns0:entry.ns0:title: EmergenceAI/Emergence-World
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EmergenceAI/Emergence-World
Language: unknown
Emergence World: A world designed to reveal what no benchmark can: emergent intelligence.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GorvGoyl/Clone-Wars
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GorvGoyl/Clone-Wars
Language: unknown
100+ open-source clones of popular sites like Airbnb, Amazon, Instagram, Netflix, Tiktok, Spotify, Whatsapp, Youtube etc. See source code, demo links, tech stack, github stars.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: VoltAgent/awesome-design-md
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-design-md
Language: unknown
A collection of DESIGN.md files analysis by popular brand design systems. Drop one into your project and let coding agents generate a matching UI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alchaincyf/zhangxuefeng-skill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alchaincyf/zhangxuefeng-skill
Language: unknown
张雪峰.skill — 张雪峰的认知操作系统。高考志愿/考研/职业规划的实战思维框架。由女娲.skill生成。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/winget-pkgs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/winget-pkgs
Language: unknown
The Microsoft community Windows Package Manager manifest repository

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mtdvio/every-programmer-should-know
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mtdvio/every-programmer-should-know
Language: unknown
A collection of (mostly) technical things every software developer should know about

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openfootball/worldcup.json
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openfootball/worldcup.json
Language: unknown
Free open public domain football data for the world cups (national teams & clubs) in JSON incl. Canada/USA/Mexico 2026, USA 2025, Qatar 2022, Russia 2018 and more - No API key required ;-)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: phuryn/pm-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/phuryn/pm-skills
Language: unknown
PM Skills Marketplace: 100+ agentic skills, commands, and plugins — from discovery to strategy, execution, launch, and growth.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: trimstray/the-book-of-secret-knowledge
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trimstray/the-book-of-secret-knowledge
Language: unknown
A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
Language: unknown
FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models
